resources.title: Maternal Mental Health Hotline
resources.description: 24/7 support for emotional health concerns during pregnancy and postpartum periods.

resources.title: Option Line National Guidance
resources.description: Confidential pregnancy support and local referral guidance for next-step planning.

resources.title: Starlight Community Help Center
resources.description: In-person support center offering parenting classes, baby supplies, and advocacy referrals.

resources.title: Linea de la Vida
resources.description: National support line for emotional crises and urgent mental health orientation.

resources.title: VIFAC Guidance Network
resources.description: Pregnancy support accompaniment and practical aid connections in multiple cities.

resources.title: Centro Esperanza para la Mujer
resources.description: Community center with counseling, legal orientation referrals, and emergency support links.

resources.title: Soutien Maternite 24h
resources.description: Telephone support for women navigating pregnancy stress, fear, or urgent uncertainty.

resources.title: Maman Blues
resources.description: Information and emotional support resources for pregnancy and postpartum challenges.

resources.title: Maison Sainte Claire
resources.description: Local accompaniment center offering dignity-focused listening and practical referrals.

resources.title: Centro de Valorizacao da Vida
resources.description: Free emotional crisis support line available 24 hours for immediate conversation.

resources.title: Rede Pro Mulher Brasil
resources.description: Educational and practical support resources for pregnancy planning and safety pathways.

resources.title: Casa da Gestante Esperanca
resources.description: Regional support center connecting women with housing, legal aid referrals, and food support.
